top_signals.title: Stocks Hit Record on AI Rally | The China Show 6/1/2026
top_signals.summary: Bloomberg: The China Show is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy.  From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Statement by President von der Leyen with Hungarian Prime Minister Magyar
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Statement Brussels, 29 May 2026 Prime Minister Magyar, dear Péter,
A very warm welcome to Brussels. The 12 April will stay in our memory for a very long time. On that day, the Hungarian people...

top_signals.title: Akeso To Boost Manufacturing Of Cancer Drug
top_signals.summary: Akeso CFO Bing Wang says the Chinese biotech firm is investing “significantly” to expand manufacturing of its lung cancer drug as it anticipates growing demand in China and the US. He speaks exclusively to Bloomberg after Akeso presented positive results for the drug at the American Society of Clinical Oncology’s annual meeting. (Source: Bloomberg)

Crypto exploit losses in May fall 90% over month to $68M: CertiK
top_signals.summary: CertiK says May is the third month so far in 2026 to record crypto losses under $100 million.

top_signals.title: Five dead, two injured after blast at Hanwha Aerospace plant in South Korea
top_signals.summary: A fire official ⁠said that an explosion had triggered the blaze, though the cause of the blast was still ⁠being investigated.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: In Finland, radioactive spent nuclear fuel soon to be buried underground
top_signals.summary: With space for 6,500 tons of uranium, a new facility in Finland is aimed at providing permanent storage for spent fuel from Finland's five nuclear reactors.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Sui Foundation says ‘major upgrade’ fixed bugs behind three outages
top_signals.summary: The Sui Network's first two outages were caused by bugs introduced in its 1.72 update, while an interim fix deployed to restore the blockchain triggered the third.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Cardano Foundation cancels annual conference after failed funding vote
top_signals.summary: Cardano Foundation has failed at its second attempt to secure funding from Cardano’s community to fund its annual conference.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
